case_title: ZURICH-AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY VS. BO CHEN et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZURICH-AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, BO DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-16-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-14-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-01-2005

DECLARATION OF DAVID W. BOSTON IN RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZURICH-AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE SET FOR AUG-16-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-31-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE SEP-16-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-20-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
